creator: matt@matthoran.com
text: This change seems to have broken my local cacti install. I did not see anything in UPDATING about any sort of migration, but the bug mentions that cacti is now following hier. I do not see any rrd files in /var/db/cacti, while they are still in /user/share/cacti. Do I need to migrate these files before Cacti will work again? The log file also contains no errors, and there is no log file in /var/log/cacti.
